title: Hashmaps 2
description: HashMaps can accumulate values for the same key. This exercise practices counting occurrences.
instructions: Complete the function to count how many of each fruit type are in the basket.
hints: You can use `.entry()` and `.or_insert()` to handle existing vs new keys.
The entry API returns a mutable reference to the value.
explanation: The `.entry()` method returns an `Entry` enum that represents a value that might or might not exist. `.or_insert(default)` inserts the default value if the key doesn't exist, and returns a mutable reference to the value in either case. This pattern is perfect for counting occurrences.
